name: Table
description: Minimal styled HTML table with header, row, cell components.

api.name: Table
api.description: Minimal styled HTML table with header, row, cell components.

parameters.name: Striped
parameters.description: When true, body rows alternate background (zebra striping) via a tbody tr:nth-child(even) rule so dense data tables are easier to scan. Applied with CSS variables only — no hardcoded colors.

examples.title: Default
examples.code: A list of recent invoices. Invoice Status Method Amount @foreach (var invoice in _invoices) { @invoice.Id @invoice.Status @invoice.Method @invoice.Amount }

examples.title: Table with Pagination
examples.code:
Invoice Status Method Amount @foreach (var invoice in _invoices.Skip(_pageStart).Take(_pageSize)) { @invoice.Id @invoice.Status @invoice.Method @invoice.Amount }
Page @_tablePage of @_tablePages

parameters.name: ColumnCount
parameters.description: Number of columns to span. Defaults to 1; set it to your column count so the empty message centers across the full table width.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: Optional plain-text message. Ignored when ChildContent is supplied. Falls back to the localized "No results" string.

parameters.name: Rows
parameters.description: Number of placeholder rows. Defaults to 3.

parameters.name: Columns
parameters.description: Number of placeholder cells per row — match your column count. Defaults to 4.

parameters.name: Animation
parameters.description: Skeleton animation style. Defaults to Pulse.

mdSummary:
# Table

Minimal styled HTML table with header, row, cell components.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Tables
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/table

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Table | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Table | Striped | `bool` | `` | When true, body rows alternate background (zebra striping) via a tbody tr:nth-child(even) rule so dense data tables are easier to scan. Applied with CSS variables only — no hardcoded colors. |
| Table | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Table | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TableBody | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TableBody | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TableBody | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TableCaption | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TableCaption | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TableCaption | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TableCell | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| TableCell | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TableCell | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TableCell | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TableEmpty | ColumnCount | `int` | `1` | Number of columns to span. Defaults to 1; set it to your column count so the empty message centers across the full table width. |
| TableEmpty | Text | `string?` | `` | Optional plain-text message. Ignored when ChildContent is supplied. Falls back to the localized "No results" string. |
| TableEmpty | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TableEmpty | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TableEmpty | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TableFooter | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TableFooter | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TableFooter | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TableHead | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| TableHead | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TableHead | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TableHead | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TableHeader | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TableHeader | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TableHeader | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TableRow | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TableRow | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TableRow | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TableSkeleton | Rows | `int` | `3` | Number of placeholder rows. Defaults to 3. |
| TableSkeleton | Columns | `int` | `4` | Number of placeholder cells per row — match your column count. Defaults to 4. |
| TableSkeleton | Animation | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation` | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation.Pulse` | Skeleton animation style. Defaults to Pulse. |
| TableSkeleton | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TableSkeleton | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Table) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (TableBody) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (TableCaption) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (TableCell) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (TableEmpty) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (TableFooter) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (TableHead) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (TableHeader) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (TableRow) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `TableBody`, `TableCaption`, `TableCell`, `TableEmpty`, `TableFooter`, `TableHead`, `TableHeader`, `TableRow`, `TableSkeleton`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Density` (`Lumeo.Density?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Table />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`
